title: Performance Profiling Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on browser-based performance analysis.

questions.question: Regarding the web development, what is the primary role of 'Performance Profiling'?
options: To identify and fix performance bottlenecks like slow-running code or excessive memory usage by recording a project's performance in the browser

questions.question: Which of these is a key benefit of using the Performance panel to profile your project's performance directly in the browser?
options: Identifying and fixing performance-related issues like slow-running code
It makes your local machine faster
It deletes old commits by mistake
Its only possible for SQL repositories
